programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the team attempt to rescue Jack's former CIA partner who went missing in Venezuela after finding evidence to take down an international arms dealer.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: In Malaysia, MacGyver and the team extract a terrorist group's money man who has intel on an impending attack, but when the man is shot, MacGyver must keep him alive in order to learn the terrorists' plans.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac and Jack work with a Russian bomb programmer and his alienated handler to defuse a Soviet-era warhead in Moscow; when the antiquated computer breaks down, Mac must find a way to fix it.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver must fix a sabotaged train to protect a woman who has proof that her boss is selling weapons to enemies of the U.S.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver must diffuse a bomb planted near the United Nations by his old adversary, the Ghost, then track the criminal down.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver goes under cover to break a notorious drug kingpin out of a maximum security prison, he must track the fugitive to the cartel's location to dismantle it after they escape.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver faces an international assassin hired to kill him, he must defend both himself and Bozer with only a corkscrew and paper towel rolls; Bozer learns MacGyver's true identity.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: In Latvia, MacGyver and his team must defend themselves and a group of U.S. embassy workers from extremists trying to retrieve their leader; Bozer faces an important decision.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac and the team search for a kidnapped prodigy from Mac's former middle school; with only pliers and some wire, Mac attempts to rescue the young genius.

programme.title: The Doorman
programme.desc: A former Marine must protect her sister’s family and stop a group of art thieves at a New York City high-rise.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: A freelance secret agent working for the government suspects that someone in her organization wants her dead.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Anna Poliatova will unleash indelible strength and skill to become one of the world’s most feared assassins.

programme.title: The Protege
programme.desc: A contract killer ventures out to avenge her mentor’s murder.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship.

programme.title: Two For the Money
programme.desc: Brandon Lang loves football: an injury keeps him from the pros.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: A retiring police detective pledges to catch the killer of a young child.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon. Edited for TV.

programme.title: Red Water
programme.desc: A freshwater shark wreaks havoc as it heads up a Louisiana river.

programme.title: Clive Barker's The Plague
programme.desc: Comatose for 10 years, the children of the world awaken to carry out their mission: the complete annihilation of the human race.

programme.title: Priest
programme.desc: PRIEST, a post-apocalyptic sci fi thriller, is set in an alternate world -- one ravaged by centuries of war between man and vampires. The story revolves around a legendary Warrior Priest (Paul Bettany) from the last Vampire War who now lives in obscurity among the other downtrodden human inhabitants in walled-in dystopian cities ruled by the Church. When his niece (Lily Collins) is abducted by a murderous pack of vampires, Priest breaks his sacred vows to venture out on an obsessive quest to find her before they turn her into one of them. He is joined on his crusade by his niece’s boyfriend (Cam Gigandet), a trigger-fingered young wasteland sheriff, and a former Warrior Priestess (Maggie Q) who possesses otherworldly fighting skills.

programme.title: The Cave
programme.desc: A group of expert cave explorers go for a deep-sea ocean dive to explore a new cave. While on the expedition, the cave collapses, leaving the team stranded. As rescuers race to save them, the team discovers that they are being hunted by unexplained blood-thirsty creatures.

programme.title: Don't Raise The Bridge, Lower The River
programme.desc: A inept schemer hatches a wild plan to raise enough money to convert a swinging Chinese discotheque back into his wife's ancestral home.

programme.title: You Were Never Lovelier
programme.desc: Love story and musical set in Latin America.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: The original Pearl Harbor movie provides a torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor, with remarkable performances from Frank Sinatra, Montgomery Clift, Burt Lancaster, Donna Reed and Deborah Kerr.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Allied commandos are dispatched deep inside the Burmese jungle to blow up a strategic bridge built by British POWs.

programme.title: Today You Die
programme.desc: A former thief who is trying to go straight seeks vengeance on those who framed him.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China And America
programme.desc: Ambushed when visiting America, Wong Fei-hung is separated from his fellow travelers and suffers memory loss.

programme.title: If… Dog… Rabbit
programme.desc: Johnnie Cooper (Matthew Modine) served time for an armed robbery, in which his father and brother also participated. When he's released from jail, he's determined to live a normal life, and gets work at a gas station. But soon his brother pays a visit.

programme.title: Squadron 303: The Battle Of Britain
programme.desc: Based on Arkady Fiedler's bestseller, Squadron 303 relates the true story of the Polish pilots who were heroes in the Battle of Britain. Jan Zumbach is recovering from a plane crash in a sanatorium when WWII breaks out. The Nazi onslaught forces him to escape from occupied Poland. A similar fate awaits the heroic flight instructor, Witold Urbanowicz. Both make their way to Great Britain and carry on the fight against the Nazi Luftwaffe. Quickly, their heroism and skill catch the attention of commanders, and an elite, Polish fighter squadron is created: Squadron 303. At first they are underestimated and mocked, but thanks to the outstanding patriotism and bravery of its members, the squadron quickly wins respect.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: An assassin learns his rival has injected him with a poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: A guy relies on his newly acquired gladiator skills to save his ex-girlfriend from kidnappers.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Pinkerton

programme.desc: Members of an international task force seek justice against the leader of an Asian drug cartel and his murderous henchmen.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A commando force from the Chinese navy intercepts terrorists and rescues Chinese citizens in Yemen.

programme.desc: Gabrielle is delighted that she has a half-sister, Keisha. But Keisha wants more.

programme.desc: Dana and Curtis' daughter, Alicia, sneaks out of the house and goes missing.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle is delighted that she has a half-sister, Keisha. But Keisha wants more.

programme.title: Buying Back My Daughter
programme.desc: Dana and Curtis' daughter, Alicia, sneaks out of the house and goes missing.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband, Paul. Even her step-daughter does not believe her.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A chronically single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the NYC dating scene.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Text To Kill
programme.desc: Teens band together to investigate the source of anonymous messages that threaten to expose their secrets.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blake, a man on the verge of marriage who becomes ensnared in a dangerous game of deception and revenge orchestrated by his vengeful ex, London. As their past resurfaces, he is forced to confront hidden secrets and navigate London's sinister manipulations, leading to explosive confrontations and heart-pounding suspense.

programme.title: Legends of the Highway
programme.desc: Follow the true story of the Florida Highwaymen, 26 self-taught African American artists who forged their own path to success in the segregated 1950’s and 60’s. Their stories are guided by the mentorship of renowned landscape painters A.E. Backus, Alfred Hair, and Harold Newton. Their troupe captured Florida’s breathtaking landscapes and sold their paintings along state highways, circumventing the traditional art world that excluded them.

programme.title: Played in My Face
programme.desc: Tonya’s life is almost picture perfect, and a wedding on the horizon to the man of her dreams, Victor. One night she receives an anonymous email exposing Victor at a hotel on the same night he claimed to be away on business. Her quiet suspicion spirals into obsession as she discovers that Victor’s betrayal runs deeper than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Room Available
programme.desc: When Emily rents a room from a seemingly kind landlord, she discovers his house hides deadly secrets — including past tenants, jealous lovers, and a dark obsession that may cost her life.

programme.title: Art of Murder
programme.desc: Detectives Trent Rollins and Latoya Cooper investigate a series of murders in which the victims all bear a mysterious symbol that’s connected to a previous murder of a known artist, Preston Sacher. As they close in, Rollins finds himself stuck between protecting his family, and doing what’s right.

programme.title: 100 Million BC
programme.desc: Time-traveling scientists inadvertently bring a giant carnivorous dinosaur back to modern Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: Ardennes Fury
programme.desc: ​​As the Battle of the Bulge rages, a U.S. tank unit trapped behind Nazi lines must fight its way back.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Our Heroes manage to finally track Murphy down and are introduced to "Z-Weed."

programme.title: Ape vs. Monster
programme.desc: An ape in space crashes on Earth. Sludge from the ship triggers massive growth in the ape and a gila monster.

programme.title: Aquarium of the Dead
programme.desc: When an accident turns animals in an aquarium to zombies, the employees have no choice but to fight back.

programme.title: Red Scorpion
programme.desc: A Soviet Special Forces soldier is sent on a mission to infiltrate an African rebel army and assassinate its leader, but the war machine they trained starts to think for himself.

programme.title: Shaky Shivers
programme.desc: From director Sung Kang (star of Fast X), after finding herself bitten by a mysterious animal, Lucy becomes convinced that she will transform into a fearsome werewolf. Joined by her best friend Karen, the two embark on a campy adventure filled with magic and mayhem, as they look to do battle with a throat-slashing creature ripped right out of an 80s horror movie.

programme.title: Homebound (Edited Version)
programme.desc: HOMEBOUND is the feature debut and psychological thriller from director Sebastian Godwin, about a father (Tom Goodman-Hill) and his new fiance (Aisling Loftus) whose trip to the countryside, turns frightening when they arrive to find his ex-wife is missing and the kids acting strange.

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When Trish (Michele Michaels) decides to invite her high school girls basketball teammates over for a slumber party, she has no idea the night is going to end with an unexpected guest an escaped mental patient and his portable power drill crashing the party in the cult classic, The Slumber Party Massacre.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: An isolated man living in the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm.

programme.title: Baghead
programme.desc: Iris inherits a run-down pub and discovers a dark secret - Baghead - a creature that lets you speak to lost loved ones, but not without consequence.

programme.title: Black Cab
programme.desc: After a night out, a couple are kidnapped by their black cab driver. Terrified, he drives them to a deserted and supposedly haunted road. But what is his plan? Is he mad or just plain evil?

programme.title: The Communion Girl
programme.desc: The ghost of a girl dressed for her first communion is ready to shed blood and take revenge on anyone unlucky enough to cross her path.

programme.title: Night of the Hunted
programme.desc: Night of the Hunted

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: Trail Of The Rustlers
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) stops a mother (Mira McKinney) and her two sons (Don C. Harvey and Myron Healey) from stealing the ranch lands and gaining control of the valley when it is discovered that an underground rivers runs through the ranches.

programme.title: Blazing The Western Trail
programme.desc: Jeff Waring (The Durango Kid) and his friends Tex Harding and Cannonball become involved in the affairs of two rival stagecoach line, one of them headed by Mary Halliday whose father has been murdered by the gang of the rival line, Forrest Brent. She is unaware of this, and hinders rather than helps the Durango Kid and his friends in their attempts to expose Brent and his gang.

programme.title: Count Three And Pray
programme.desc: A reformed scoundrel returns from the Civil War to rebuild a hate-filled town's only church.

programme.title: The Parson And The Outlaw
programme.desc: Dexter (fka Billy the Kid) hangs up his guns in an attempt to forget the past and start a new life.

programme.title: The Prescott Kid
programme.desc: Tim McCoy stars in this western about the crime of cattle rustling. His flair with six-guns is more than gang leader Chase can handle. Also stars Shiela Bromley (credited as Sheila Mannors) as Dolores and Joe Sawyer (credited as Joe Sauers) as Willoughby.

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as Fuzzy Q. Jones.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: Randolph Scott plays James Barlow, an agent from Chicago hired to bring the notorious Reno brothers to justice. But wouldnt you know it? The Reno gang includes a beautiful young woman (Mala Powers), who catches Barlows eye. This western from director Tim Whelan (The Thief of Bagdad) features cinematography by two-time Oscar winner Ray Rennahan (Gone With The Wind), while the screenplay was by noted author Horace McCoy (They Shoot Horses, Dont They?). Theres also an all-star cast, including Forrest Tucker, J. Carrol Naish, Edgar Buchanan, Denver Pyle, and several other shaggy sidewinders!

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Oscar winner Michael Curtiz (Casablanca, Mildred Pierce) directed this exciting drama about Army officer Jeb Stuart and the days leading up to the Civil War. Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Rather than a gorgeous Hollywood starlet, actor Cameron Mitchell (Carousel), playing cowboy Ted Daniels, shares the screen in this film with a magnificent wild horse named Gallant Bess, who he tames, trains and keeps for himself. But after Ted is gravely injured in a fixed rodeo, Bess is stolen away from him and forced to join a cruel traveling carnival in this fast-paced western from director Lew Landers (The Adventures of Rin Tin Tin).

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Doc Holliday 2

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's the Friday after Thanksgiving, and Chewed Up is all about transforming leftovers into brand-new masterpieces. Carla Hall whips up a decadent Ice Cream Pecan Pie using leftover pie slices, while Michael Symon cooks a savory Stuffing Frittata. The hosts confess their favorite late-night leftover habits, debate mayonnaise brands, and share wild stories about flying with pets.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Fan Fridge episode, Michael Symon battles a stubborn blender to create a Whipped Cottage Cheese Dip with crispy mortadella chips. The crew embraces the pre-holiday scramble, sharing funny stories about morning commutes and paper cuts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Special guest Liz Symon joins the kitchen to bake her foolproof Orange Olive Oil Cake. While she bakes, Liz and Michael laugh off a viral AI rumor that they divorced, reveal their morning Wordle routines, and recall a disastrous early date involving bad crab stuffed shells.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Amy Sedaris joins the crew for a festive break! Michael leans into his Greek heritage to bake savory Spanakopita triangles, while Clinton and Amy get crafty making adorable "Pinecone Gnomes." The group plays "Chew It or Screw It," debates edible glitter, and shares their most hated foods.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's "Holiday Reset Week"! Carla Hall brings a comforting yet lighter meal to the table: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks served with a creamy cauliflower puree and buttery breadcrumbs. The hosts debate the best Christmas movies, Clinton pitches "Bean Week," and the studio briefly loses power!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly bakes an impressive yet simple "Invisible Apple Cake" loaded with thinly sliced apples, cinnamon, and nutmeg. The crew discusses the dangers of mandolins, Michael gets emotional recalling a surprise restaurant visit, and they debate holiday party etiquette.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Niku Udon; Lemongrass-Caramel Chicken; Stir-Fried Angel Hair Pasta - Chris is in the kitchen to take you through three winning recipes from his rotation: A comforting udon noodle dish with thin slices of beef in a smoky, savory, slightly sweet broth; simple braised/stir-fried chicken that is somewhere between Vietnamese clay pot catfish and Taiwanese Three Cup Chicken; and a go-to quick pasta with tofu and veggies stir-fried in a flavor-packed sauce.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sliders 3-ways, Because Kids Love Small Food: Kids love to eat small foods! It's a fact. Chris Ying shares three different ways he makes miniature burgers for his family, including Dad's Hacky BBQ Pork Char Siu, a ground pork slider and a traditional ground beef slider.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Chris Ying cooks three easy breakfasts that you and (hopefully) your kids will love! The first recipe is for a physics-defying Swedish waffle that only has three ingredients (and are unbelieveably light and crispy). Next Chris makes a sticky rice omelette inspired by Nadine Levy Redzepi that is so simple and delicious. Just little chunks of Thai sticky rice fried crisp, then blanketed in egg. Finally Chris makes a family favorite—pork floss pancakes. These are similar to scallion pancakes and one of the best (and hackiest) paths to to Chinese breakfast pastries.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Cantonese-Style Steamed Fish with Morgan McGlone: World-class Australian chef Morgan McGlone joins Chris Ying to share his go-to technique for preparing a whole steamed fish—something his son absolutely loves! A lot of people are intimidated by cooking a whole fish, but this is our plea to you to get your kids started on steaming/eating whole fish early in life!

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Butter Board" - Wow, even Chris couldn’t resist the call of the #butterboard. Here he makes an anchovy-onion-olive version inspired by something he saw on TikTok and his favorite French-Italian flatbread, pissaladière

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Creamy Gochujang Pasta" - Majordomo TV’s Chris Ying unlocks the mystery of the TikTok trend of creamy gochujang pasta and wonders if it’s actually just a bad substitute for vodka sauce.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Pickle Spaghetti" - After watching a strange, clickbait-y TikTok, Chris finds himself wondering if combining pickles and spaghetti sauce might actually be worth trying.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Mochi Potato Ball" - Testing out a viral recipe for cheese-stuffed Mochi Potato Balls with Honey Butter, Chris wonders whether he’s stumbled upon a quick hack for squishy rice balls or just a long way to nowhere.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Burger Stacking Order" - A rigorous study on the most structurally sound way to assemble a classic cheeseburger. No slippage allowed.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Redemption Rice" - After an ill-advised dalliance with a terrible chicken korma recipe, Chris tries to redeem the category of mixed-rice dishes, starting with the classic Japanese Takikomi Gohan.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Garlic and Onions appear in many Italian dishes, and in this episode they actually become the "star ingredients." Lidia starts the meal with a quick and easy Savory Onion Tart followed by a delicious, mild and creamy Garlic Risotto. For dessert, it's all about chocolate with the moist Torta Caprese.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing more delicious than butterflied poultry with super crispy chicken. In this episode, Lidia starts with a Spicy Butterflied Cornish Hen made with hot cherry peppers, rosemary and wine. She then pulls out the beer to add to her Potatoes Baked in Beer. Our favorite Grandma Erminia joins Lidia to taste the Squash and Ricotta Tart.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about family in this episode as Lidia shares three of her favorite family recipes. Marinated Meatballs, Zucchini Parmigiana, Artichoke Carbonara and Jam Filled Mezzaluna are the stars of this episode.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing like pasta to bring Lidia's family to the table. In this episode, Lidia shares some of her favorite pasta dishes including a comforting Baked Rigatoni with Zucchini, a delicious Penne with Ricotta and Mushrooms and one of her personal favorites, Fettuccine with a Clam and Leek Sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: The combination of potatoes and pasta in one dish is not unusual in Italy and in her Pipette with Sweet Potatoes, Lidia adds a beloved American ingredient to give it a nutritious and complex finish.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing a delicious and nutritious weeknight meal for the family is not always easy but Lidia shares some of her quickest and simplest recipes that will work in any kitchen. The menu includes: Carrot and Apple Salad; Salmon Fillets with Prosecco served with Savory Potatoes and Apple Crumble - a dessert that can be made with almost any seasonal fruit.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Lidia honors the Grandmothers of the family. She starts with a delicious and quick Skillet Gratin of Mushrooms and Chicken, one of her mother's favorites. As the chicken is cooking, she heads to the side dish, Celery Potatoes and Tomatoes. Joining her at the end of the show is Lidia's granddaughter, Julia to taste Grandma Rosa's Apple Cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia fell in love with the Soup and Sandwich concept shortly after she arrived in America. In this episode, she prepares a velvety Spinach and Chickpea Soup; an Italian style Baked Toast Sandwich and to finish, she enjoys some Oatmeal Crepes with her grandson Ethan.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores medieval English taverns, inns, and alehouses, each serving different roles and social classes. Taverns sold wine, inns provided lodging, and alehouses were private homes selling ale. The episode covers wine quality control, bread and ale laws, and their reputations for gambling and excess. He recreates bokenade, a beef pottage with saffron, cloves, and verjuice.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the Old West saloon as a social hub for food and drink. He covers its evolving design, popular beverages like whiskey, beer, champagne, and cocktails, gambling games such as poker, and the famous “free lunch” tradition. The episode highlights regional foods, oysters’ popularity, and recreates an 1886 pork and beans recipe from *Cooking for Profit*.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores WWII home front rationing in the U.S., from 1942 sugar limits to the red and blue point system for meat, dairy, and canned goods. He covers price controls, Victory Gardens, labor shortages, internment camps, and black-market “meatleggers.” He also recreates Betty Crocker’s “emergency steak,” a budget-friendly mix of ground beef, cereal, and milk.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s luxurious first class, from modest suites to lavish parlor suites with private promenades. He covers dining in the saloon and Ritz, daily meals, amenities like the gym and Turkish bath, and the 10+ course final dinner. Using survivor accounts, he recreates the famous peaches in Chartreuse jelly dessert from April 14, 1912.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s first class breakfast from April 11, 1912, featuring over a dozen dishes by Escoffier. He recreates baked apples, smoked salmon coronets, shirred eggs, and buckwheat cakes with blackcurrant conserve. The episode highlights dining venues, passenger pets, and the tragic story of honeymooners Victor and Maria Josefa Peñasco.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the 4–6 month, 2,200-mile Oregon Trail journey (1846–1869), covering provisions like flour, bacon, and hardtack, cooking over buffalo chips, and staple meals like Johnny cakes. He discusses hunting, trading with Native Americans, celebrations, and hardships, including spoiled food, salt-rising bread, pies, and pioneers leaving possessions at Fort Laramie.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Next up in our extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project house, we installed foam insulation in the walls and attic, hung drywall, painted the exterior, and began installing the kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The interior of the Kuppersmith Project house is taking shape as the cabinetry, moldings, and heart pine flooring are installed. Plus, we take sneak peak at the finished décor from designer Joe Boehm of Better Homes & Gardens magazine.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re grading the lot and preparing for the driveway on the outside of the Kuppersmith Project house renovation. Meanwhile on the inside, we’re focused on installing the granite and quartz countertops in the kitchen and master bath.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling a number of projects outside on the Kuppersmith house, including installing motorized retractable screens and pouring the concrete driveway. Inside we’re putting in a shower surround and putting down a tile floor in the bathroom.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Work on the Kuppersmith Project – my extensive renovation of a 1926 Tudor style home – kicked into high gear with the sanding and finishing of the antique heart pine floors and installation of a beautiful paver patio.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: From lattice to lawn irrigation, there are a lot of details that have to be addressed when tackling a major renovation like the Kuppersmith Project house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: My extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project home entered the home stretch with the plumbing and electrical fixtures and door hardware being installed. Outside, landscaping the yard of the historic home was underway.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The final touches are underway on the Kuppersmith Project before the decorators arrive. From landscaping and outdoor lighting to finishing the garage and installing door locks, my renovation of this historic 1926 home is almost complete.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: After months of renovation and remodeling, followed by weeks of decorating from the design team at Better Homes and Gardens and Renovation Style magazines, the Kuppersmith Project house is finally finished, and it’s time to take the grand tour!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If there’s a new product or tool to make your home better, you’ll find it at the on display at the International Builder’s Show. We were on hand for this year’s show to give you a front row seat on the latest trends and innovations in home improvement.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your yard could use some TLC, we’ve got you covered! Our Around the Yard editor, Julie Day, provided a wealth of tips – from dealing with weeds and pruning shrubs to watering and fertilizing plants – to make your yard the best looking on the block.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Spring is a great time to get outdoors and take care of all those nagging repair jobs around your home. From fixing outdoor faucets and pressure washing your home to repairing an asphalt or concrete driveway, we’ve got you covered!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: You’ve seen them on late night TV promising to solve all the woes of home ownership; but do those problem solving products for the home really work, or are they just as waste of your time and money? We put them to the test to find out!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: It seems everyone has a budget these days, but no one wants to stop improving their home. These projects will show you how to turn a little cash and a lot of elbow grease into an upgrade you’ll be able to brag about.

programme.desc: After eating Super Pets' trick chocolates, Jett can only move very slowly. An emergency call comes in from a young girl in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, who needs an ice maker delivered. programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter mermaid students learning to befriend fish in Cebu, Philippines. Jett and Jerome deliver a microphone and speaker to a girl who wants to sing with them. programme.desc: Storm and Stella search for Jett and Donnie after the two Super Wings disappear in thin air. Astra locates their whereabouts - they're in Paris, 1889! programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.desc: Kasja and her dad use Super Wings’ food truck to serve pancakes in space despite a rock belt. Jett and Traver restore power in Brazil by fixing the dam and reversing Iguaçu Falls.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Road Rangers Kids Show
programme.desc: A garbage truck, ambulance, police car, fire engine and tow truck start working together and form the super hero gang for kids Road Rangers to protect their car cartoon city. In this kids show collection of transportation cartoon adventure stories and educational videos children & toddlers will learn shapes, colors, abc's, numbers and more.

programme.title: Luke & Lily Non Stop
programme.desc: Luke & Lily non-stop playlist with fun & kids Song videos,Children will watch and learn our other popular & kids friendly songs like London Bridge, Incy Wincy Spider, Pat a Cake, Miss Polly Had a Dolly, Ten In the Bed and more cartoon rhymes and songs for babies.

programme.title: Junior Squad Non-Stop Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Junior Squad as they sing along, dance in this fun kids video. Learn preschool songs like swing song, rock a bye baby, are you sleeping Brother John, this is the way, five little babies, animals sound song, haha song, swing song and more.

programme.title: Are You Sleeping Brother John + Kids Songs
programme.desc: This nursery songs series from Junior Squad features popular kids songs for children like "Are You Sleeping Brother John?", "Baby Shark Song", "Wheels on the Bus" and a lot more.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpy & More Kids Rhymes (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Do you kids know what happened to Humpty Dumpty when he sat on the wall? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with the Little Tree House gang, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Super Supremes No No Song + More Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs
programme.desc: Here comes non-stop english rhymes for kids by the Supremes, so stay tuned with us and enjoy listening to your favorite nursery rhymes!

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there's an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch. Things get complicated when there's a competition to decide which Ranch Hand runs the Best Bunkhouse.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Skarloey has lots of jobs and Thomas takes an Admiral to open a new maritime museum.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: A famous storyteller comes to the island and Emily works with a garbage collection engine.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The Duke and Duchess of Boxford visit Sodor and James takes the Mayor to a festival.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas meets “Hector the Horrid” and Gordon takes an engineer to repair some points.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Percy thinks flashing lights are a spaceship and Henry thinks he has lucky trucks.

programme.desc: Mama puts a ban on television for a week. Brother and Sister go trick or treating.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa wants to remove an old tree stump. Then, Brother joins an art class.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Papa takes the cubs fishing. Then, Brother gets his own key to the tree house.

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: The Bears host a family reunion. Brother and Sister accidentally let cows loose!

programme.title: The Berenstain Bears
programme.desc: Brother tutors Sister. Papa’s friendship with Farmer Ben is tested.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a very special performance for their friends in the park. They all gather in the caboose to prepare for a stupendous night of singing, dancing, and magical fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends put together a Caboose Color Collection which showcases the primary colorsred, yellow and blue. This activity sparks Barney and the kids' imagination, and along with Baby Bop, they realize just how colorful the world can be!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children are amazed to find out that playing games and having fun in the park is a great way to exercise. When the rain starts to fall, they use their imagination to come up with clever ways to stay active and have fun indoors.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are full of excitement as five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing friends are planning a special show in the park tonight! Angela is determined to learn the trumpet, but she finds it challenging. To help them get ready for the band's practice, Mr. Boyd introduces the children to various types of horns, making it a fun learning experience!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Meet Colleen, Mr. Boyd's niece! Barney and the kids love having fun together every day but making a brand NEW friend is something extra special! With Barney's help, they all learn how to get to know new friends.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Tony has a box filled with numbers that he made with his dad and is proudly showing them to everyone. Suddenly, a strong gust of wind scatters the numbers all around! Barney and his friends team up to go on an exciting number hunt, helping Tony find and collect his homemade numbers again.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle, Terry, after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney, Nick, and Sarah are delighted to see Terry come out of his shell, which leads to a discussion about the meanings of in and out. Baby Bop arrives with her chrysalis, and together with Angela's turtle, Barney and his friends are inspired to do In and Out activities.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. The weather becomes an exciting opportunity for the kids to learn all about the season of Spring and discuss all the fun activities they can partake in this season. This includes flying a kite, riding a bike, and enjoying the rainbows in the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After feeling tired of being told to be careful, BJ learns that saying be careful is a way of showing love and concern. This important lesson prompts Barney to teach his friends essential safety rules. Spending time with Barney is always enjoyable, but it's also crucial to learn how to play it safe to stay protected and happy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends begin the day by playing hopscotchwith a twist. They discover that making a triangle requires 3 lines and 3 corners, which sparks their excitement to explore more shapes. To have even more triangle fun, Barney takes them on a camping trip where they get to explore and learn about different shapes in the world around them.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its the day of the bike parade, but Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Mr. Boyd works quickly to help fix Nick's bike in time for the parade. While waiting, Barney takes the opportunity to teach his friends all about bike safety, making sure they're ready to ride safely and have a great time in the parade!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After the kids discuss their desire for a special day, Beth creates Happy Day, a special holiday in which each friend makes a wish and the others try to make it come true. When Beth hurts herself, BJ learns the importance of doing good deeds for others.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney plans a magical picnic for his friends and their families to spend quality time together and create lasting memories. Each kid has brought a family treasure to show Barney, which they all excitedly spend time sharing with one another.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The kids gather at the park, talking about how hot it is and wondering what to do on such a day. Thanks to Barney's brilliant idea, what starts as a too hot afternoon turns into a totally cool day as he introduces them to the wonders of water. Excitedly, they all team up to find creative ways to stay cool and have a splashing good time together!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Even though the park feels like a second home for Barney and his friends, BJ dreams of building his very own totally awesome, completely cool house. While they eagerly wait to see it, they start talking about the different rooms a house can have. However, when BJ forgets to include a space for Baby Bop in his plans, Barney reminds him that family is what truly makes a house feel like a home.
